selfRoles.title: Self roles
selfRoles.subtitle: Let members assign approved roles from a message in a text channel.
selfRoles.emptyDescription: Create a panel to let members choose their roles.
selfRoles.embedHint: Add up to 10 embeds. Role reactions are shown after the embeds.
selfRoles.maxEmbeds: A panel can contain up to 10 embeds.
selfRoles.emptyEmbed: This embed has no content yet.
selfRoles.previewHint: This preview updates locally as you edit. Discord may render content differently.
selfRoles.mappingHint: Each role and emoji can only be used once. Up to 20 mappings.
selfRoles.emojiPickerHint: Search server emojis or choose a Unicode emoji. You can paste any Unicode emoji below.
selfRoles.unicodePickerHint: Browse every Unicode emoji by category, search by name, or select a skin tone.
selfRoles.noEmojiResults: No Unicode emojis match this search. Paste any emoji above.
selfRoles.noServerEmojis: No server emojis match this search.
selfRoles.repairConfirm: Repair this panel? Rankoon will rebuild its Discord message if it is missing.
selfRoles.maxMappings: A panel can contain up to 20 role mappings.

validation.title: Enter a panel title.
validation.embeds: Add at least one message embed.
validation.embedTitle: Enter a title for each embed.
validation.mappings: Add at least one role mapping.
validation.roles: Each role can only be mapped once.
validation.emojis: Each emoji can only be mapped once.

errors.selfRolesLoad: Could not load self-role panels and resources.
errors.selfRoleDelete: Could not delete the self-role panel.
